creator: sam@inf.enst.fr
text:
I must add that one bug has been recently discovered in this send-pr. The
fix is:

--- send-pr.sh.orig	Tue Apr 11 15:18:15 2000
+++ send-pr.sh	Tue Apr 11 15:18:24 2000
@@ -329,7 +329,7 @@
 To: $GNATS_ADDR
 Subject: 
 From: $FROM
-Reply-To: $REPLYTO
+Reply-To: $REPLY_TO
 Cc: $CC
 X-send-pr-version: $VERSION
 X-GNATS-Notify:
